description_long: This is a large, four-engine propeller-driven airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a classic airliner design. The wings are straight and mounted low on the fuselage, each supporting two engines with visible propellers. The tail section features a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, forming a standard tail configuration. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with two main gear units under the wings and a nose gear visible beneath the cockpit. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage, with multiple windows providing visibility for the crew. The exterior is primarily metallic silver with some colored markings and details.
description: A large, silver, four-engine propeller airplane with a low-mounted straight wing and conventional tail, featuring a forward cockpit and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the nose, cockpit windows, four propeller engines, and the full wingspan.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the fuselage, the low-mounted wings with engines, and the tricycle landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the back of the wings and engines.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile of the fuselage, wings, engines, and landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight wings, no visible winglets, and a slight dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Four turboprop engines mounted on the wings, two per side.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear, all retractable.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, likely multi-seat.
